paper_title: Analysis of Satellite-measured Sea Surface Temperature and Cold Water Extent

methods.description: Process for obtaining Aqua MODIS 8-day composite SST data and computing temporal mean SST for generating composite maps.

steps.description: Eight-day composite data with a horizontal resolution of 1 km over the period of 2013-2021 was obtained from the publicly available ERDDAP server (http://basin.ceoe.udel.edu/erddap/griddap/index.html) maintained by the Ocean Exploration, Remote Sensing and Biogeography Laboratory at University of Delaware.
steps.searchable_summary: Download Aqua MODIS 8-day composite SST data from ERDDAP server.

steps.description: Temporal mean SST values at each pixel are used in composite maps in Figures 1 and 2.
steps.searchable_summary: Compute temporal mean SST values for each pixel.
outputs: Grid of temporal mean SST values

steps.description: Temporal mean SST values at each pixel are used in composite maps in Figures 1 and 2.
steps.searchable_summary: Generate composite maps using temporal mean SST data.
inputs: Grid of temporal mean SST values

methods.description: Process for using NOAA Optimal Interpolation SST (OISST) data to evaluate long-term trends in the spatiotemporal extent of waters with SST <4 °C.

steps.description: The NOAA Optimal Interpolation SST (https://psl.noaa.gov/data/gridded/data.noaa.oisst.v2.html) from 1982-2022 were used to evaluate long-term trends in the spatiotemporal extent of waters with SST <4 °C (Fig. 6).
steps.searchable_summary: Download NOAA Optimal Interpolation SST (OISST) v2 data.
inputs: NOAA OISST v2 data source URL (https://psl.noaa.gov/data/gridded/data.noaa.oisst.v2.html)

steps.description: First, the area of waters with SST <4 °C on each day of the time series was computed across the NES domain considered in composite maps (Figs.1-2, 6A).
steps.searchable_summary: Compute the daily area where SST is below 4°C within a defined geographical domain.

steps.description: For each year of the satellite record, this daily time series of "cold area" was integrated to construct an annual time series of the spatiotemporal extent of waters with SST <4 °C.
steps.searchable_summary: Aggregate daily cold area values into an annual time series.
outputs: Annual time series of cold water extent

steps.description: Linear regression was used to determine the mean long-term trend in this annual time series.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform linear regression on the annual cold water extent time series.
inputs: Annual time series of cold water extent
